name: Sauteed Green Beans & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap both ends off the green beans and pull off any strings.
2. Cut large pole beans crosswise into 2-inch pieces. Do not cut smaller French haricots verts.
3. Fill a mixing bowl or medium pot with 4 cups cold water and add 1 tray of ice cubes. Set aside.
4. Bring 4 quarts of water with 2 tablespoons kosher salt to a boil over high heat. Add the beans when the water returns to a boil.
5. Cook the beans, uncovered, until tender but still crisp. This will take from 3 to 5 minutes depending on the size and age of the beans. Do not overcook.
6. Drain the beans immediately and place them in the ice water. Stir until cool, then drain.
7. Spread the beans on towels and pat dry.
8. Slice mushrooms thinly and set aside on a plate.
9. Heat olive oil and butter in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add pine nuts and mushrooms.
10. If using dried tarragon, add it now. Cook, stirring, about 5 minutes.
11. Add the green beans and fresh chopped tarragon, and cook until beans are hot, about 3 more minutes.
12. Transfer to a serving platter and serve immediately.
